creator: robbak@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 188038
patch to update to 0.15.1

An update has been released by the maintainers. It is a bugfix release.

https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/blob/master/doc/release-notes/release-notes-0.15.1.md

This patch upgrades net-p2p/bitcoin, ad by extension, the slave ports.
